text:

 Gentlemen, is anoncvs.freebsd.org still suppoed to work? I know freefall
 stopped offering the service recently, but this hostname doesn't point
 at freefall.
 
 Is there a list of mirrors that the originator could try?
 
 Thanks,
 Sheldon.
